title: GLM-5.2 (Fully Tested): I got EARLY ACCESS & This MODEL is CRAZY!
summary: GLM-5.2 is an improved language model from Z AI featuring a 1 million token context window, expected open-weight and MIT licensed release, and strong coding performance scoring 81.43 on benchmarks. Available through the GLM Coding Plan at approximately 8 dollars per month.
writeup: This video covers early-access testing of GLM-5.2, an iteration on GLM-5.1 that adds a 1 million token context window and is expected to ship as open weights, possibly under an MIT license. On coding benchmarks it scores around 81.43, roughly 6 percent below Opus 4.8. It is positioned as a low-cost coding option at about 8 dollars per month through the GLM Coding Plan.
